words.sentence: My father works at the hospital.
words.sentence_ja: 私の父は病院で働いています。

words.sentence: The station is near my house.
words.sentence_ja: 駅は私の家の近くにあります。

words.sentence: We have a pharmacy in our town.
words.sentence_ja: 私たちの町には薬局があります。

words.sentence: My sister has a beautiful red dress.
words.sentence_ja: 私の姉は美しい赤いドレスを持っています。

words.sentence: Please put on your coat before going outside.
words.sentence_ja: 外に出る前にコートを着てください。

words.sentence: I always eat breakfast in the morning.
words.sentence_ja: 私は毎朝必ず朝食を食べます。

words.sentence: This question is difficult for me.
words.sentence_ja: この問題は私には難しいです。

words.japanese: 興奮している・わくわくしている
words.sentence: I am very excited about my birthday.
words.sentence_ja: 私は誕生日をとても楽しみにしています。

story.title: A Special Day Out
sentences: Today is a special day, and I am very excited.
I put on my new dress and a warm coat.
My mother and I always go out together on Saturdays.
First, we walked to the station.
The station is busy in the morning.
We stopped at the pharmacy to buy some medicine.
Then we visited my grandfather at the hospital.
It is always difficult to see him in bed.
But he smiled and looked happy.
He was excited to see us, too.
